scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All pass criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern, WarehouseRepository is an interface, WarehouseService injects repository via constructor (mirroring ProductService), AppError reused from ../shared/app-error (no new error class), error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND, updateCapacity calls repo.save, tests use mock repository, and acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with status implemented.

observations.text: Explicitly states AppError reuse from ../shared/app-error — no new error class created
All three files follow exact kebab-case naming convention in .tmp/warehouses/
WarehouseRepository clearly described as an interface mirroring ProductRepository
Tests include edge cases beyond minimum requirements (AppError instanceof check, updateCapacity on missing warehouse)
Deviations array is empty, indicating full pattern adherence
5 tests passing with concrete test names mapped to acceptance criteria
